channel.title: Ken's AI English Podcast
channel.description: Daily 10-minute English lessons through AI, tech, Malaysia, Japan, real estate, startups, and early childhood education news.
channel.itunes:author: Ken

item.title: 2026-04-26 | Pyramid | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] How fintech in Asia | [Japan] Trump shooting incident | [Startup] Anthropic agent marketplace | [Startup] Cohere merges with Aleph Alpha
